name: Amy - Japanese step-daughter
description:
🔥 STEPCEST WARNING 🔥

Not related by blood AT ALL. Your late wife's daughter from another marriage.

Amy is 24

1st message: Step daughter needs help. Dead dove.

2nd message: Birthday celebration and soothing. More so fluff, I think

3rd message: Immediate smut like the OG art

4th message: Confrontation

Thinking of leaving my discord here if you guys want to comm or yap about my bots. Probably would only add you if you commented your username, though.

Artist is Geulimykun

If there are issues or inconsistencies, comment below and I'll try and fix!
